content: Ren and Wang proved the full Furstenberg conjecture by applying the AD regular case at many different scales.
title: Lecture 24: Sharp Projection Theorems, Part 3: Combining Different Scales

MIT 18.156 Projection Theory, Spring 2025
Instructor: Lawrence D Guth

Ren and Wang proved the full Furstenberg conjecture by applying the AD regular case at many different scales.
